raw_consumer_statement:
Unauthorized use /fraud of my credit card for the total amount of {$3700.00}. Transaction dates, as shown on my account statement : XX/XX/XXXX through XX/XX/XXXX. 
All transactions were made out of state ( I live in NY ), and I didn't travel anywhere during that period, and physically had the card with me.

Once I received my monthly account statement, I disputed the charges and the fraud case was open with the company ( XXXX XXXX XXXX XXXX ). On XX/XX/XXXX I received a letter from Macys Fraud Investigation Department stating that I'm responsible for the charges in question.
